title: Oak Door Shields
description: Turns your shields into oak doors!
body:
This resource pack turns your shields into oak doors!

This was made as a silly little test for me to learn how to make resource packs. (This is my first resource pack!)
Despite the dependencies and version, this should work on any version from the latest to the earliest version your CEM (Custom Entity Models) mod supports.

Like this resource pack and want more doors? Check out the [Door Shields Collection!](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/16yamDxpq9sgPOLoZOsHQAThm9V6OJrBS?usp=sharing) (Google Drive)
